publication.changeSummary: Misconception MCQ, canonical fill-gap, and no code task for Interactive interpreter; every item remains blocked from formal exams pending independent human review.

items.title: Interactive interpreter: reject the misconception
items.prompt: Which statement is source-aligned for Python: Beginner to Intermediate and corrects this misconception? REPL expression output is produced by print and any successful interactive sequence can be rerun as a complete script unchanged.

feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Use the REPL for a bounded observation, distinguish display-hook output from print, then preserve explicit imports, state, inputs, and assertions in saved code.
